questions.statement:
<p>Eight people are sitting in two parallel rows with four people each in such a way that there is equal distance between adjacent persons. 5, 6, 7 and 8 are seated in the same row facing South. 1, 2, 3 and 4 are seated in the same row facing North. 4 and 2 do not sit at the extreme corners of their row. 7 sits at the extreme right end of their row and is exactly opposite 1. 3 sits exactly opposite 8.</p>

<p>Who sits at the extreme left end of the row of people sitting facing South?</p>

<p>Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series, will complete the series.</p>

<p>VW_ V _ _ VW _ _ WV&nbsp;</p>
In a certain code language, &#39;SO&#39; is written as &lsquo;34&rsquo; and &#39;BED&#39; is written as &lsquo;11&rsquo;. How will &lsquo;MOAN&#39; be written in that language?

In a certain code language, &lsquo;JACCUZI&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;KZDBVYJ&rsquo; and &lsquo;QUIZZER&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;RTJYADS&rsquo;. How will &lsquo;BUZZWIG&rsquo; be written in that language?

In a code language, &#39;you can start&#39; is written as &#39;sent room dark&#39;, &#39;can you read&rsquo; is written as &#39;room sent less&#39;, and &#39;you are good&rsquo; is written as &#39;tyre room spin&#39;. What is the code for the word &#39;can&#39; in this language?
In a certain code language, GOA is written as 7151 and DOG is written as 4157. How will MAN be written in that language?

Six students are sitting around a circular table facing the centre. Sonal is sitting second to the right of Lavanya. Rana is sitting second to the right of Sonal. Karishma is sitting third to the right of Rana. Mary is an immediate neighbour of both Rana and Sonal. Who is sitting immediate right of Kumari?

<p>Which two signs should be interchanged to make the given equation correct?</p>

<p>12 + 156 &divide; 13 &times; 6 - 100 = 50</p>

Reema starts from her house and cycles 4 km towards the west and then turns right and cycles 6 km. She again turns right and cycles for X km to reach her school. Point A is to the south of her school and also 2 km to the west of her house. What is the value of X?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term and the sixth term is related to the fifth term.&nbsp;</p>

<p><span class="math-tex">\(\left[\frac{1}{97}\right]:\left[\frac{1}{63}\right]::\left[\frac{1}{114}\right]: \ ?::\left[\frac{1}{89}\right]:\left[\frac{1}{55}\right]\)</span></p>
In a certain code language, &#39;VACCINE&#39; is written as &#39;WCFGNTL&#39; and &#39;SYRINGE&#39; is written as &#39;TAUMSML&#39;. How will &#39;NEEDLE&#39; be written in that language?

options: Both Conclusions I and II follow. /
Both Conclusions II and III follow.&nbsp; /
Both Conclusions I and III follow.&nbsp; /

questions.statement:
<p><span style="">Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed at line MN as shown.</span></p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/22/12/F1_Mrunal_SSC_10.12.2022_D45.png" style="width: 161px; height: 94px;" /></p>
From its nest, a bird flew 25 m towards the north-east. It then took a right turn and flew 7 m. Again, it took a right turn and flew 75 m. In which direction is the bird now from its nest?

<p>Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series, will complete the series.</p>

<p>L _ _ LM _ L _ L _ML</p>
In a code language, &#39;TRUCKS&#39; is written as &lsquo;GIFXPH&rsquo; and &lsquo;WASTE&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;DZHGV&rsquo;. How will &#39;FANTASY&#39; be written in that language?

Six people are sitting in two parallel rows with 3 people each in such a way that there is equal distance between adjacent persons. S, T and U are seated in the same row facing south. X, Y and Z are seated in the same row facing north. U sits at the extreme right end of their row and is exactly opposite X. T is the immediate neighbour of U and sits exactly opposite Z. Who sits at the extreme right end of the row facing North?

<p>Select the word-pair in which the two words are related in the same way as are the two words in the given pair.</p>

<p>Lion : Forest</p>

<p>Which of the following numbers will replace the question mark (?) and complete the given number series?</p>

<p>600, 590, 575, 550, 510, ?</p>

<p>Which letter-cluster will replace the question mark (?) to complete the given series?</p>

<p>PORK, NQPM, LSNO, JULQ, ?</p>
